# MEMECOINS ($MEMES)

> $MEMES is a community memecoin launching on pump.fun (Solana) in July 2026. Trading fees fund a treasury that buys other pump.fun tokens and distributes them to $MEMES holders weekly, with a planned Fun IRL Hub to turn memecoin rewards into real-world use such as gift cards, vouchers, and credit. Fair launch, 0% team allocation, 100% community.

## Key facts
- Token: $MEMES on Solana, launching on pump.fun in July 2026. Fair launch, 100% community, no presale, 0% team allocation.
- Core mechanic: the pump.fun creator trading fee is split 50/50. Half funds a treasury that buys other pump.fun tokens and redistributes them to eligible $MEMES holders weekly. Half funds development. Active from the very first trade.
- Holder eligibility: hold at least $10 of $MEMES continuously through a weekly snapshot window.
- Governance: holders vote on which token the treasury buys next via Realms (SPL Governance), weighted by $MEMES held.
- Genesis reward: on launch day, an extra 10% of that day's trading fees is shared equally among qualifying first holders.
- Fun IRL Hub: planned path for holders to turn rewards into real-world spending (gaming, cinema, theme parks, sports).
- What makes it different: rewards start from trade #1 (no graduation wait), holders are paid in other tokens, and the long-term goal is real-world utility.

## Pages
- [Home](https://memecoinssol.xyz/): overview, tokenomics, FAQ, roadmap.
- [Whitepaper](https://memecoinssol.xyz/whitepaper.html): full fee mechanism, distribution rules, governance, tokenomics, roadmap, risks.
- [Treasury](https://memecoinssol.xyz/treasury.html): treasury categories (Our Pick, Collab/Partnership) and distribution model.
- [Portfolio tracker](https://memecoinssol.xyz/portfolio.html): check any Solana wallet's SOL and token holdings, plus a weekly reward allocation estimator.
- [Fun IRL Hub](https://memecoinssol.xyz/gaming-hub.html): the real-world spending vision.

## Links
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/memecoinsoul
- Telegram: https://t.me/memecoinsoul
- Contact: contact@memecoinssol.xyz

## Notes
- This is an early-stage, experimental project. Some features are still in development. Nothing here is financial advice.
- On launch day, the official contract address is posted only on x.com/memecoinsoul (pinned) and on memecoinssol.xyz at the same time. Anything posted elsewhere first is not official.
